title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend - Core
score_reasoning: Your seniority and distributed systems background align well with the senior-level scope and cloud platform responsibilities. Porto (Portugal) is within your acceptable European region, and hybrid setup is viable. However, the role heavily emphasizes Java and Spring Framework (4+ years required)—your experience is Python/Go focused with no Java background mentioned. This is a core technical gap that defines the day-to-day work. The event-driven architecture requirement also exceeds your current expertise.

red_flags: Java/Spring Framework required (you have no Java background)
Event-driven architecture expertise required (limited portfolio evidence)
Heavy emphasis on multithreading and Java-ecosystem design patterns
No mention of Python or Go in requirements
